title: Section 76
content: In the case of all persons subject to this Act, being prisoners of war, whose pay and allowances have been forfeited under clause (a) of section 69, but in respect of whom a remission has been made under section 75, it shall be lawful for proper provision to be made by the prescribed authorities out of such pay and allowances for any dependants of such persons, and any such remission shall in that case be deemed to apply only to the balance thereafter remaining of such pay and allowances.
